# Nemanja Vujić — vujic.ai

> Personal site and blog of Nemanja Vujić, a Forward Deployed Engineer at DataCebo based in Belgrade, Serbia. Writing and building across AI, large language models, retrieval-augmented generation, and data science — with detours into powerlifting, health and longevity research, music, and geopolitics.

## About
- Nemanja Vujić is a Forward Deployed Engineer at DataCebo. He works with AI agents, large language models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and data science. Also known as "Vuja". Based in Belgrade, Serbia.

## Thoughts
- [Thoughts](https://vujic.ai/thoughts/): essays and notes on AI, technology, and the craft of building.
- [The three things that improved my sleep the most](https://vujic.ai/thoughts/three-things-that-improved-my-sleep/): A friend asked what has the biggest impact on my sleep.
- [Does the EU AI Act stop you and your employees from using ChatGPT, Claude and other LLMs?](https://vujic.ai/thoughts/does-the-eu-ai-act-stop-you-using-llms/): For most everyday uses of ChatGPT, Claude and other LLMs, the EU AI Act's heavy obligations fall on the vendor, not you. What actually makes a use case high-risk — and what that means for deployers.
- [An edge stops working the moment it becomes famous.](https://vujic.ai/thoughts/an-edge-stops-working-the-moment-it-becomes-famous/): Being early to a tool was never the edge. A look at how optimized marketing and an urgency-driven feed manufacture the panic that you're falling behind.

## Deep Thoughts
- [Deep Thoughts](https://vujic.ai/deep-thoughts/): longer, slower pieces and deep dives.
- [What belongs here](https://vujic.ai/deep-thoughts/what-belongs-here/): A slower room for the pieces that need more than a thought, where I take the long way around.
